sql_array: CREATE TABLE example_vectors (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, vector_array LIST<float>);
SELECT id, vector_array, vector_array <=> [1, 2, 4] AS distance FROM example_vectors;
UPDATE example_vectors SET vector_array = [1, 2, 6] WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, vector_array FROM example_vectors WHERE vector_array <=> [1, 2, 4] < 0.2;
